admissionStep3Question2Label: Will you study an English language course before starting your intended programme or as your primary study purpose?
admissionStep3Question2Helper:
This may include:
• Completing an English pathway due to not meeting the current English language requirements for your intended programme
• Studying English as your main study goal

admissionStep3UploadTranscriptsHelper: Please upload copies of all your educational documents from your High School Diploma up to your most recent qualification, including:
admissionStep3UploadTranscriptsTranslati: You should upload the officially translated and notarised versions of these documents. If you do not currently have the translated and notarised versions available, please upload the original documents for now so we can begin reviewing your case. However, the translated and notarised versions will still be required later to properly process your application.

admissionSavedToast: Progress saved. You can return anytime.
admissionSubmittedBody: Congratulations! Your application has been successfully submitted and you've completed the first step towards studying in New Zealand. Next, your application will be reviewed by our admissions team. We'll be in touch with you via email regarding the result of your application. If you need to contact us before then, please use the live chat or message your assigned consultant.
admissionStep1Helper: Select the programme(s) you want to apply for. You can choose multiple programmes, but only one intake date per programme.
admissionStep1EmptyState: No programmes selected yet. Use the picker above to add one.
admissionStep1NoChoices: Add at least one programme before continuing.
admissionStep1AddDuplicate: This programme is already in your list.
admissionStep1AddError: Could not add programme. Please try again.
admissionStep1RemoveError: Could not remove programme. Please try again.
admissionStep1ReorderError: Could not reorder. Please try again.
admissionStep1ProgrammesLoadError: Could not load programmes. Please refresh.
admissionStep1WelcomeTitle: Welcome to Sorena Visa — Your Global Education & Migration Platform
admissionStep1WelcomeIntro: Congratulations! You've taken the very first step toward securing your place in one of our partner institutions and study pathways worldwide. We're here to help, so if you have any questions throughout the application process, please contact us via the live chat in the bottom right-hand corner of the page. Remember — you can save this application at any time and come back to it later if needed.
admissionStep1DocumentsIntro: To help us process your application and issue your assessment or offer as quickly as possible, please have the following PDF documents ready:
admissionStep1Doc2: Most recent education transcripts (e.g. Secondary School, Diploma, Bachelor, Master)
admissionStep1Doc3: Documents showing evidence of English test results (if any)
admissionStep1Doc4: Copy of visa refusal letters (if you were declined a visa before by ANY country)
admissionStep1DocumentsClosing: If the required documents are not uploaded as part of your application, we may request them later as part of your assessment or admission process.
admissionStep1ProgrammeSectionIntro: Let's get started! First, we need to know what you would like to study. You may select more than one course.
admissionUploadDropzone: Click to upload or drag a file

admissionStep4Helper: Upload any extra documents that support your application.
